tasks.label: 2YOU: ensure local server
tasks.command: $port=4173; if (-not (Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $port -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)) { Start-Process -FilePath python -ArgumentList @('-m','http.server',$port,'-d','site') -WorkingDirectory '${workspaceFolder}' -WindowStyle Hidden | Out-Null; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 700 }; Write-Host "2YOU local site: http://localhost:$port"
